entry.title: Julien added 'The Accidental Woman'
entry.content: 📚 “The Accidental Woman” by Jonathan Coe ⭐️ Rated: 4/5 📝 "Jonathan Coe’s first published novel already shows clear signs of his trademark quirkiness. The intrusive narrator is genuinely delightful, adding a playful layer to what is already a swift and engaging read. That said, there is sometimes a sense of abruptness at the end of chapters, as if the rhythm stumbles just before moving on. Even so, it remains a tremendously good book, revealing just how talented Coe was from the very beginning, and how he would continue refining his craft with each subs..." 🏷️ #JonathanCoe
